sources: Freddie Mac Primary Mortgage Market Survey (PMMS) – 30-year fixed rate 6.65%, 15-year fixed 5.89% as of March 2025
Bankrate national average - 30-year fixed 6.88%, 15-year fixed 5.90% as of March 2025 (used for rate ranges)
Federal Housing Finance Agency (FHFA) – average purchase loan amount $356,000 Q4 2024
National Association of Realtors (NAR) – typical first mortgage amount $300k-$350k (2024)
Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB) – prepayment penalties rare, capped at 2% of balance if present
Fannie Mae Selling Guide – no prepayment penalty on conventional loans; extra payments allowed without limit
_meta.confidenceNotes: All numerical values are approximations derived from authoritative sources but exact dual-source cross‑validation was not performed. Ranges are realistic industry benchmarks; typical values are midpoints of published data. Prepayment penalty and overpayment limit data are based on common industry rules and regulatory guidance, not on a specific survey with two point‑matching sources.
